narrative:
Cols 82-I (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,131 registered voters, with 56.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.2%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.7 percentage points.
